# autoSaveTextFields

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether text fields save their values before changing preference panes.

## Declaration

```swift
var autoSaveTextFields: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], text fields are forced to give up their responder status before [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/shouldUnselect] is called on the preference pane. If it is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], the preference pane is responsible for forcing text fields to give up their responder status before saving them. The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Handling keyboard focus

- **firstKeyView**: The first view in the keyboard focus chain.
- **initialKeyView**: The view that should have keyboard focus when the pane is selected.
- **lastKeyView**: The last view in the keyboard focus chain.
